domain_entity.brief: An abstract job template within a compute batch.
domain_entity.description:
Defines the problem to be solved: which app version to use, where the input
data lives, and how many times to run it for redundancy. The BOINC equivalent
of 'workunit'. Does not track execution state — that belongs to results.

primary_key.description: UUID primary key for the workunit.

columns.name: input_uri
columns.description: URI pointing to the zipped input data bundle in object storage.

columns.name: config_uri
columns.description: URI pointing to the engine config file (ORE XML, Llama JSON, etc.).

columns.name: priority
columns.description: Scheduling priority; higher values are dispatched sooner.

columns.name: target_redundancy
columns.description: Number of independent results required before this workunit is complete.

columns.name: canonical_result_id
columns.description: FK to the validated canonical result; NULL until the Validator accepts a result.
